claim_boundary: Implementation freeze only; no paired control score extraction or production bridge result is contained here.

production_validation.control_cfg_restraint_semantics: raw manifest hashes plus protocol-lock binding plus exact annotation removal and cross-campaign canonical equality
production_validation.deployment_trust_root: launcher-authenticated repository-visible SHA256SUMS binds freeze, preregistration, builder, tests, and teacher utility
production_validation.openat_parent_chain: held directory FDs from filesystem root with O_DIRECTORY/O_NOFOLLOW plus post-read inode-link rechecks
production_validation.output_publication: exact four regular files, receipt last, final snapshot revalidation
production_validation.test_identity_isolation: distinct schema/status/verified-status and canonical production roots forbidden in test mode

self_hash_policy: The freeze JSON cannot contain its own digest. The adjacent .sha256 file records its SHA256 and the launcher-authenticated deployment SHA256SUMS binds that digest.
